productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Deo
description: Today, the Benetton Group is present in 120 countries around the world! And here is a must try body spray from its Sport range for women. Bottled in a metallic aubergine coloured handy can, the fragrance lasts all day and its strong but feminine scent is sure to make you turn heads!Quantity: 150 mlCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyes
